Package dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.tooling.ide

Class IntellijKBean

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.tool.KBean
dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.tooling.ide.IntellijKBean
public final class IntellijKBean extends KBean

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    IntellijKBean.SyncFocus
    Determines which IntelliJ `.iml` file should be synced when there are two `.iml` files present: One for jeka-src One for the project The SyncFocus specifies which of these `.iml` files will be prioritized for synchronization.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class dev.jeka.core.tool.KBean

    KBean.JkDirAgnostic

      use customizeIml(Consumer) instead
      Configures IML file that will be generated.

    • customizeIml

      public IntellijKBean customizeIml(Consumer<JkIml> imlCustomizer)
      Configures IML file that will be generated.

    • excludeJekaLib

      public IntellijKBean excludeJekaLib()
      In a multi-module project, a module that this one depends on might already include the Jeka dependency. This method prevents adding the Jeka dependency directly to this module.

    • replaceLibByModule

      public IntellijKBean replaceLibByModule(String libName, String moduleName)
      Replaces the specified library with the specified module. The library is specified by the end of its path. For example, '-foo.bar' will replace 'mylibs/core-foo.jar' by the specified module. Only the first matching lib is replaced.
      See Also:
      • JkIml.Component.replaceLibByModule(String, String)

    • addModule

      public IntellijKBean addModule(String moduleName, JkIml.Scope scope)
      Adds a module dependency to the IntelliJ project configuration with the specified scope.
      Parameters:
      moduleName - The name of the module to be added as a dependency.
      scope - The scope of the module dependency, defined by JkIml.Scope.
      Returns:
      The current instance of IntellijKBean for method chaining.

    • setModuleAttributes

      public IntellijKBean setModuleAttributes(String moduleName, JkIml.Scope scope, Boolean exported)
      Sets the scope and exported attribute to the specified module.
      See Also:
      • JkIml.Component.setModuleAttributes(String, JkIml.Scope, Boolean)

    • getProjectRootDir

      public Path getProjectRootDir()

    • findRegularImlFilePath

      public Path findRegularImlFilePath()
